evaluation_protocol: full pipeline: L0 enrichment → L1 validation/hashing → L2 detection → L3 trust fusion → L4 explainability → L5 threat alignment (rule-based; no training required; runtime reset every 200 records to bound L0 IsolationForest history)
score_source: Layer 3 fused_score — continuous [0, 1] from trust-weighted fusion engine
threshold_note: WP-5.3: threshold updated from 0.30 to 0.09 (optimal per grid search)
